name: node-normalize-package-data
title: node-normalize-package-data
description:
Normalizes package metadata - Node.js module
This module is used by node-read-package-json to normalize data it
reads from a package.json file typically found in Node.js modules,
but in principle it could come from any source.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-normalize-package-data because Normalizes package metadata - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-normalize-package-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-normalize-package-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-normalize-package-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
